description: Style NoteUpdated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both!Heel: 2.2"Product DescriptionBlack forefoot wide glossy strap Brown footbed with printed brandingTPU outsole with a wedge heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
